summary: Enhanced Hotels Management Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. All new hotel fields verified (address, check-in/out times, board types, amenities, highlights, cancellation policy, supplier info, rooms array). Frontend: Admin Dashboard hotel edit form shows all 10 new fields. Trip Builder correctly filters hotels by destination city (Dubai shows 3 Dubai hotels, hides Baku and Tbilisi hotels).

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - cosmetic issue from Emergent preview framework, does not affect functionality

backend_hotel_city_filter.case_insensitive: PASS - City filter works with uppercase/lowercase

backend_hotel_new_fields.address: PASS - All hotels have address field
backend_hotel_new_fields.supplier_name: PASS - All hotels have supplier name
backend_hotel_new_fields.supplier_cost_per_night: PASS - Positive number for margin calculation

backend_hotel_rooms.rooms_array: PASS - All hotels have rooms array
backend_hotel_rooms.room_fields: PASS - Each room has id, name, type, price, amenities
backend_hotel_rooms.room_pricing: PASS - price and original_price fields present

trip_builder_hotel_city_filter.filtering_result: PASS - Only 3 Dubai hotels shown when Dubai is destination

critical_code_review_comments: Hotel city filtering correctly uses MongoDB regex for case-insensitive matching
All new hotel fields from HotelCreate model are properly seeded in backend
Frontend TripBuilder.jsx correctly passes city parameter when fetching hotels (line 131)
Hotel edit form in AdminDashboard.jsx includes all new fields with proper data-testid attributes
Board types displayed as checkboxes with proper state management
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotels Management enhanced with detailed fields. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_hotels_enhanced.py. City filtering works in both API and Trip Builder. Admin Dashboard hotel form includes address, check-in/out times, total rooms, board types (RO/BB/HB/FB checkboxes), amenities, highlights, cancellation policy, supplier info.
